batch: Batch D - Facing 3-bet population draft restore
description: Restored 60 full-cell facing-3bet population-draft charts from the local 2026-05-20 backup. Not owner-approved.
instructions: Population-draft seed only. Do not mark approved without owner review.
Every cell is explicit and validates to 169 hands.
These charts were previously quarantined; owner requested them restored for chart review/data-entry coverage.

charts.title: BTN vs BB 3-Bet @ 15bb
charts.sourceNotes: Population draft - review before approval. Restored from local backup mtt-study-backup-after-facing-3bet-population-drafts-2026-05-20.json after owner requested all available chart data be entered for later verification. These are not source-verified or approved. They are reviewable placeholders only and remain excluded from default trainer unless population drafts are explicitly included. No colour-as-data extraction. CALL_JAM is preserved where present. Missing cells were not imported; every chart has explicit 169 cells.
